685000000000000000000001 description: You want Volkov to open his door? Then you do not come empty-handed. Tony likes proof, and I like insurance. Bring me a Roler first. After that, go to Ground Zero dressed like one of my people. Scav vest, Ushanka, cheap weapon, dirty work. Kill PMCs while they are still trying to figure out who you are. Then leave alive. If you can do that, Tony may decide you are worth hearing.
685000000000000000000001 note: Fence wants you to pay for the introduction, then prove you can pass for Scav trash while killing PMCs on Ground Zero.
685000000000000000000001 startedMessageT: Start with the watch. Then put on the scav kit and go to Ground Zero. Kill PMCs. Walk out alive.
685000000000000000000001 successMessageT: Good. You paid the price, wore the rags, and still made PMCs bleed. Tony heard enough. The door is open, for now.
685000000000000000000001 failMessageText: You made noise, but not the kind that opens doors.
685000000000000000000001 completePlayerM: The watch is handed over. Ground Zero is handled.
685000000000000000000001 changeQuestMess: Fence is watching how you handle the introduction.
685000000000000000000011: Hand over 1 Roler Submariner gold wrist watch
685000000000000000000012: Eliminate 8 PMCs on Ground Zero while wearing a Scav vest and Ushanka
685000000000000000000013: Survive and extract from Ground Zero
